title: Shoes
description: this is a mod that adds shoes, etc.
body:
# Welcome to the shoes mod!

This mod adds plenty of things to make your adventure more fun by adding two dimensions, shoes, a powerful yet easy to obtain ore, two biomes, and a boss!

## The shoe grumpts biome

This is most likely the first modded biome you will across, it has the base material for making a portal to the shoe dimension, otherwise it's useless.

## Lobble

This is the base material for crafting OP weapons that one shot pretty much everything. It also is the second dimension and you make the portal to this dimension using lobble bricks. And the boss is in this dinension too, its name is the Lobble Lord and it wields a lobble sword and wears red sneakers and is much better beatable with ranged weapons instead of melee.

## Shoes

Shoes are really the base of the mod and aren't essential but they do look cool and provide two armour points.

## The dimensions

### The shoe realm
This dimension has a lot of shoe related things like shoe polish, grime, and more in future updates.

### The lobble dimension

I've already said a little bit about this but this dimension has some strange things going on like, Diamond water that may or may not give you a seizure when you look at it*, and more will be added later!

## Plans for the future

1.0.1 more shoe variants




1.1.0 or 1.2.0 The lobble expansion

and thats all i really plan on for now, thank you!

*JK it doesn't

Also please contact me on my discord server, i'll get to you in 1-6 hours depending on the day

(This is all for the kids but adults can too!)
